_comment: AZCK Command Centre — security page data block. Updated by forge-code after each audit. Engine in security.html reads this on load.

findings.title: ForgeWatcher password stored plaintext on disk
findings.summary: Supabase login password stored plaintext. 9 chars, ACL restricts to user/admin/SYSTEM but any process as user can read.
findings.fix: Move to Windows Credential Manager (DPAPI-encrypted). Delete the JSON config.

findings.title: Ollama listening on all IPv6 interfaces (LAN-reachable)
findings.summary: Local LLM server is queryable by any device on home LAN — no auth.

findings.title: Chrome Remote Desktop extension installed
findings.summary: If unintentional or unused, this is a remote-access path. Native messaging host present.
findings.fix: Confirm intent. If unused → uninstall. If used → verify account + 2FA.

findings.title: Outbound firewall = allow-by-default, logging off
findings.summary: Nothing stops a rogue process from phoning home. No log trail.
findings.fix: Phase 3 proper — deny-by-default + whitelist + block logging.

findings.title: Adobe Acrobat extension with <all_urls> host permission
findings.summary: Can inject scripts into every visited site. Widest-permission extension installed.
findings.fix: Remove if you don't use the browser save-to-PDF feature.

findings.title: .claude local history contains JWT-pattern strings
findings.summary: 53 files contain JWT-shaped strings (likely public anon keys, but 1 mentions service_role). 0 Anthropic keys found.
findings.fix: Confirm .claude is not Drive-synced. Optionally purge history older than N days.

findings.title: Local admin 'user' has PasswordRequired = false
findings.summary: Likely a Microsoft account login with PIN/Hello (PasswordRequired reports local-only). Warrants confirmation.
findings.fix: Verify MS account has strong password + 2FA at account.microsoft.com.

findings.title: SMB Users share exposed
findings.summary: Anyone with local creds + network access can browse. SMB2 encryption enforced, but unnecessary surface.
findings.fix: Remove-SmbShare -Name Users -Force (unless actively used for cross-PC file sharing).

findings.title: Windows Connected Devices Platform (port 5040) on all interfaces
findings.summary: Nearby Sharing to Surface/Xbox devices. Low risk on home LAN.
findings.fix: Settings > System > Nearby sharing > Off (if unused).

findings.title: Delivery Optimization (port 7680) on all interfaces
findings.summary: Peer-to-peer Windows Update. Signed content only, low risk.
findings.fix: Optional — Windows Update > Advanced > Delivery Optimization > Off.

findings.title: Logitech Options+ agent (port 59869) on all interfaces
findings.summary: Used for Logitech Flow keyboard/mouse roaming between PCs. Logitech has had historical CVEs.
findings.fix: Disable Flow in Options+ or firewall-block 59869 if unused.

findings.title: Razer services running as LocalSystem
findings.summary: Overprivileged for RGB lighting. All bind 127.0.0.1 only (good). Note only.
findings.fix: Uninstall if not using Razer peripherals. Else accept.

passChecks: Windows Defender ON · all protections active
D:\Private-Brain on local disc — NOT synced to Google Drive
Zero .env or credentials.json in Drive folder

phases.name: Audit
phases.summary: Read-only Windows Defender, firewall, ports, browser, Cowork/Forge, Drive checks. Findings saved.

phases.name: Hardening
phases.summary: Apply the approved fixes one by one. Per-item approval.

phases.name: Outbound firewall whitelist
phases.summary: Deny-by-default outbound + whitelist Anthropic/Supabase/GitHub/Google/mem0 + log blocked attempts.

phases.name: Forge sandbox rules
phases.summary: CLAUDE.md update restricting write paths + forge-audit-log.md + toast on out-of-bounds writes.

phases.name: Reporting layer
phases.summary: ForgeWatcher extension: toast on firewall blocks, RLS violations, new device logins, service offline.
